name: verein-budget-planner
description: Offline-first Electron app for non-profit finance planning (Windows/macOS/Linux)
author: Nikolas Häfner

scripts.rebuild:native: node scripts/ensure-electron-arch.cjs && node -e "const v=require('electron/package.json').version;const cp=require('node:child_process');const npmCmd=process.platform==='win32'?'npm.cmd':'npm';const forcedArch=process.platform==='win32'&&process.arch==='arm64'?'x64':process.arch;const env={...process.env,npm_config_runtime:'electron',npm_config_target:v,npm_config_disturl:'https://electronjs.org/headers',npm_config_arch:forcedArch,npm_config_target_arch:forcedArch};const run=(args)=>cp.spawnSync(npmCmd,args,{stdio:'inherit',shell:false,env});let r=run(['rebuild','better-sqlite3']);if(r.status!==0){console.error('\n[rebuild:native] Prebuild failed; falling back to source build (requires VS Build Tools on Windows).');r=run(['rebuild','--build-from-source','better-sqlite3']);}process.exit(r.status??1);"
